name: ImGui Menu 14 UI for Peekaboo Port
objective: Implement ImGui UI matching example 14 style (custom fonts, widgets, layout) in Peekaboo C# project using ImGui.NET and Silk.NET backend, integrated with core services.
exit_criteria: Standalone ImGui demo matching example 14 style (fonts, layout, custom widgets)
ImGui integrated into Peekaboo with services configurable via UI
dotnet build and dotnet test pass without errors
UI interactions correctly update Peekaboo services (e.g., toggles enable/disable capture)
